SessionStart.command: echo "[SIC] SessionStart: Read .github/copilot-instructions.md. Tenant isolation end-to-end. No infra/IAM changes without explicit approval."

UserPromptSubmit.command: echo "[SIC] Before edits: state design intent (2–3 sentences). No new top-level folders. No IAM wildcards."

PostToolUse.command: echo "[SIC] After changes: run tests/lint. If infra touched: cdk synth + cdk diff. Update docs/learning log. Consider ADR for security/tenancy/dataflow."
